dashboard.statsDesc: Your business at a glance: deals, revenue, tasks, tickets. Updates in real-time.
dashboard.pipelineDesc: Your deals funnel by stage. See how much money is at each step.
dashboard.tasksDesc: Upcoming and overdue tasks. Red = overdue — needs immediate attention.
dashboard.activityDesc: Recent team actions: calls, emails, notes. Stay up-to-date with everything happening.
dashboard.widgetDesc: Toggle any dashboard block on/off. Arrange your workspace how you like.

deals.kanbanDesc: Your deals organized by stage. Drag cards between columns to move them through the pipeline.
deals.pipelineDesc: Switch between pipelines if you have multiple sales funnels (sales, partnerships, etc.)
deals.summaryDesc: Total and weighted value of all active deals. Weighted = adjusted by win probability.
deals.cardDesc: Click any deal to see details: AI prediction, suggestions, timeline, and more.
deals.newDesc: New deal links to a company, contact, and pipeline stage.

dealDetail.stageDesc: Current position in the pipeline. Click on a stage to advance the deal.
dealDetail.aiPredDesc: AI estimates win probability based on activity, history, and stage. Updated automatically.
dealDetail.aiSugDesc: Actionable recommendations: call, email, schedule meeting. Click 'Create Task' to act on them.
dealDetail.quickDesc: Add a note, task, or email directly from the deal card without leaving the page.
dealDetail.sidebarDesc: Value, company, contact, probability, expected close date. Click the pencil to edit.
dealDetail.timelineDesc: Complete history of this deal: who did what and when.

tickets.listDesc: Customer support requests. Each has a number, priority, and SLA deadline.
tickets.slaDesc: Time until response/resolution deadline. Yellow = approaching, red = breached.
tickets.kanbanDesc: Switch between list and Kanban view. Kanban shows tickets by status columns.
tickets.autoDesc: Tickets are auto-assigned to the best agent based on workload, expertise, and resolution speed.
tickets.newDesc: When you type the subject, AI automatically suggests category and priority.

ticketDetail.headerDesc: Ticket number, subject, and SLA countdown. Red timer = SLA breach.
ticketDetail.aiDraftDesc: Click to generate a reply based on knowledge base and similar resolved tickets. Edit before sending.
ticketDetail.aiSummaryDesc: Get a 2-3 sentence summary of the entire conversation thread.
ticketDetail.aiStepsDesc: Recommended steps to resolve this ticket, generated by AI.
ticketDetail.commentsDesc: Public comments are visible to the customer. Internal — only to your team.
ticketDetail.macrosDesc: Quick actions: change status + add comment + assign — all in one click.

leads.listDesc: Potential customers before qualification. From website, ads, or manual entry.
leads.scoreDesc: Every 6 hours AI scores each lead on 8 factors: email quality, title, source, budget, activity. A = hot, F = cold.
leads.statusDesc: new → contacted → qualified → converted (became customer) or lost.
leads.convertDesc: When qualified, click Convert — creates a contact + company + deal automatically.

reports.kpiDesc: Key metrics: revenue, deals, conversion rate, tasks. Your business health at a glance.
reports.funnelDesc: How many deals at each stage and their total value. See where deals get stuck.
reports.leadFunnelDesc: From new to converted. Identify where leads drop off in your pipeline.
reports.aiComDesc: Click to get an AI analysis of your pipeline, wins, and risks as a text narrative.

inbox.channelsDesc: All messages in one place: email, WhatsApp, Telegram, Facebook, Instagram.
inbox.statsDesc: Conversations, unread messages, average response time at a glance.
inbox.convDesc: Grouped by contact. See the last message and which channel it came from.
inbox.threadDesc: Full history with the contact across all channels.

campaigns.statsDesc: Overview: draft, scheduled, sent, open rate. Track performance of each campaign.
campaigns.newDesc: Choose type (email/SMS), select recipients, write content, schedule send time.
campaigns.listDesc: All campaigns with status, recipients, and A/B test results.

journeys.headerDesc: Automated action chains. Trigger → series of steps → goal. Automate follow-ups, onboarding, reminders.
journeys.listDesc: Your active and draft journeys. Click to edit the flow or view enrollment stats.
journeys.newDesc: Build a visual chain: email → wait → condition → task → SMS. Drag and drop blocks.

segments.filtersDesc: Filter by All, Dynamic (auto-updating) or Static (fixed list). Dynamic segments recalculate automatically.
segments.newDesc: Define conditions like 'engagement > 50 AND industry = IT'. Use in campaigns and journeys.
segments.listDesc: Your segments with contact count. Click to view members or edit conditions.

invoices.statsDesc: Total invoiced, paid, overdue, and outstanding amounts. Track your cash flow.
invoices.newDesc: Add line items, taxes, discounts. Link to a deal or company. Set payment terms.
invoices.listDesc: All invoices with status: draft → sent → viewed → paid / overdue.

finance.tabsDesc: Overview, Receivables (AR), Payables (AP), Funds, and Payment Orders — all in one place.

budgeting.headerDesc: Create budget plans, track variance (plan vs actual), and get AI analysis of deviations.

profitability.kpiDesc: Revenue, costs, margins, EBITDA — your profitability at a glance.
profitability.tabsDesc: Services, Clients, Overhead, Employees, Parameters — drill down into each cost area.
profitability.chartsDesc: Visual breakdown of costs and revenue. Identify where money goes.

pricing.headerDesc: Manage pricing profiles, rate cards, and service costs. Link to deals for accurate quoting.

budgeting.title: Budgeting
budgeting.subtitle: Budget planning, forecasting and control
budgeting.noPlansSubtitle: Create your first plan to get started
budgeting.emptyNoLines: No budget items. Click "Add row" or "Seed from template".
budgeting.emptyNoActuals: No actual expenses. Add the first one.
budgeting.emptyNoLinesHint: No items. Add the first one or use a template.
budgeting.emptyNotEnoughDataSub: Create at least 2 plans for comparison
budgeting.emptyAddLinesForAnalytics: Add budget items to display analytics
budgeting.confirmApprove: Approve budget? Changes will be locked after approval.
budgeting.forecastGenerateHint: Click "Generate forecast" to populate the matrix
budgeting.templatesDescription: Business direction library for quick plan population
budgeting.hintTabWorkspace: Main workspace: budget lines, plan vs actual, variances
budgeting.hintTabPL: Income statement: Revenue → COGS → Gross Profit → Expenses → EBITDA
budgeting.hintTabForecast: Monthly forecast with 3 scenarios: base, optimistic, pessimistic
budgeting.hintTabComparison: Compare up to 4 plans: variances by category with materiality filter
budgeting.hintTabPlans: Plan management: create, approve, reject, close
budgeting.hintTabTemplates: Direction template library for quick new plan population
budgeting.hintKpiExpPlan: Total planned expenses for the period
budgeting.hintKpiExpActual: Actually incurred expenses (from cost model or manual entry)
budgeting.hintKpiRevPlan: Total planned revenue for the period
budgeting.hintKpiRevActual: Actually received revenue for the period
budgeting.hintKpiMarginActual: Actual margin = Actual revenue − Actual COGS − Actual expenses
budgeting.hintKpiVariance: Deviation of actual from plan. Positive = better than plan
budgeting.hintColCategory: Budget item name (expense or revenue category)
budgeting.hintColDepartment: Department or business unit this item belongs to
budgeting.hintColPlan: Planned amount for the period. Click to edit
budgeting.hintColActual: Actual amount. Blue 'Auto' badge = from cost model
budgeting.hintBtnAiAnalysis: Generate Da Vinci analysis of budget variances (top 5 categories)
budgeting.hintBtnSyncActuals: Update actuals from cost model for auto-actual lines
budgeting.hintBtnExport: Download budget as Excel (3 sheets: overview, lines, actuals)
budgeting.hintBtnAddRow: Add new budget line (expense, revenue, or COGS)
budgeting.hintSectionRevenue: All revenue sources: services, products, subscriptions
budgeting.hintSectionCOGS: Direct costs: goods purchased, direct service delivery costs
budgeting.hintSectionExpenses: Operating expenses: salaries, rent, infrastructure, licenses
budgeting.hintGrossProfit: Gross Profit = Revenue − COGS. Shows margin before operating expenses
budgeting.hintOperatingProfit: Operating Profit (EBITDA) = Gross Profit − Operating Expenses
budgeting.hintScenarioBase: Base scenario: no adjustments, as planned
budgeting.hintForecastCell: Click to enter forecast. Italic = calculated (plan ÷ months)
budgeting.hintMateriality: Materiality threshold: only show items with variance above threshold
budgeting.hintBadgeAuto: Value sourced automatically from cost model
budgeting.hintChartExpenses: Expenses: plan vs actual by category
budgeting.hintChartRevenues: Revenues: plan vs actual by category
budgeting.hintFilterType: Filter by type: all, expenses, or revenues
budgeting.hintStatusDraft: Draft: can be edited, lines and actuals can be added
budgeting.hintStatusPending: Submitted for approval. Awaiting manager decision
budgeting.hintStatusRejected: Rejected: needs revision. Can be returned to draft
budgeting.hintBtnApprove: Approve plan. Editing will be locked after approval
budgeting.hintFieldGroup: Select parent group for nested line
budgeting.hintFieldAmount: Planned amount in ₼ for the full period
budgeting.hintTemplateApply: Create budget lines from selected templates. Duplicates are skipped
budgeting.hintTemplateActive: Inactive templates are hidden when applying to plans
budgeting.kpiExecutionTooltip: Budget execution by margin: Actual margin / Planned margin × 100%. Accounts for both revenue and expenses. Breakdown by expenses and revenue shown below
budgeting.alertOverspendDesc: Expenses exceeded budget by {pct}% ({amount}). Budget review or expense adjustment recommended.
budgeting.alertWarningDesc: Expenses exceeded budget by {pct}% ({amount}). Monitor remaining expenses to stay within budget.
budgeting.summaryNegativeMargin: Warning: operating loss ({amount}). Expenses exceed revenue.
budgeting.summaryNoRevenue: Revenue section is empty — P&L analysis not possible.
budgeting.hintFilterVariance: Show only lines with non-zero variance between actual and plan
budgeting.hintAddRevenue: Add revenue items for complete P&L analysis. Without revenue, margin and operating profit will be negative.
budgeting.varianceNotePlaceholder: Explain the reason for the variance...
budgeting.hintWaterfall: Waterfall chart shows the path from plan to projection through forecast, actual, and variance. Helps visualize where changes occurred
budgeting.hintOvPlan: Total of all planned budget lines (expenses + revenue + COGS)
budgeting.hintOvForecast: Expected amount based on manager forecasts. May differ from plan based on current trends
budgeting.hintOvActual: Actual amounts spent/received. May include data from cost model (auto-actual)
budgeting.hintOvVariance: Difference between actual and plan. Positive = overspend or overperformance, negative = savings or underperformance
budgeting.hintOvYearEnd: Year-end projection: Actual for elapsed months + Forecast for remaining. Shows expected year-end result
budgeting.hintColForecast: Forecast amount for the period. Italic = calculated value (plan / number of months)
budgeting.matrixEmptyHint: Click "Generate matrix" to create budget lines by cost types × departments.
budgeting.matrixNotConfiguredHint: To use the matrix view, you need to generate budget lines using the "Cost type × Department" scheme.
budgeting.configPatternHint: {dept} will be replaced with department serviceKey
budgeting.configServiceKeyHint: Key from SERVICE_DEPT_MAP in cost model
budgeting.csvImportTemplateDesc: Download CSV template with required columns
budgeting.approvalWorkflow_rejectDialogDesc: Please specify the reason for rejection.
budgeting.csvImport_templateDesc: The template contains all categories and departments from the current plan. Fill in the amount column.
budgeting.csvImport_uploadDesc: Upload a CSV file with actual data
budgeting.deptAccess_adminNote: Admin and Manager roles have full access by default.
budgeting.deptAccess_note: Admin and Manager roles automatically have full access to all departments. Department owners only apply to Sales, Support, and Viewer roles.
budgeting.timeMachine_hint: Drag the slider or use arrows to see how your budget looked at each point in time. All data below reflects the selected moment.
budgeting.expenseForecast_subtitle: Monthly expense forecast by cost types and departments.
budgeting.expenseForecast_noCostTypes: No active cost types. Add them in the Settings section.
budgeting.expenseForecast_costModelDesc: Budget planned expenses are calculated automatically from the cost model. The expense forecast is used as a fallback — if the cost model lacks data for a category, the forecast from this table will be used.
budgeting.salesForecast_subtitle: Annual revenue forecast by services. Stored without VAT — toggle to show with VAT (18%).

pricing.sectionDescription: Start free, upgrade when ready. No hidden fees.

testimonials.t1_quote: LeadDrive finally showed us which clients are profitable and which drain our resources. A turning point for our consulting firm.
testimonials.t1_metricLabel: Cost model in the first 3 months
testimonials.t2_quote: The 7-channel inbox freed us from managing WhatsApp, Telegram and email separately. Our response time dropped by 60%.
testimonials.t3_quote: We replaced Salesforce + HubSpot + spreadsheets for P&L with one platform. One platform, one source of truth.
testimonials.t4_quote: The Da Vinci agent automatically handles 40% of our support tickets. The cost model shows exactly where our margins are.
testimonials.t5_quote: The budgeting module with P&L tracking — this is what we always needed. No more exporting to Excel for financial analysis.
testimonials.t6_quote: The journey builder for invoice reminders cut our overdue payments by 45%. Automated follow-ups really work.

faq.sectionSubtitle: Can't find an answer? Contact us.
faq.a1: Yes! Start with a 14-day free trial on any plan. No credit card required.
faq.q2: How is LeadDrive different from Salesforce or HubSpot?
faq.a2: LeadDrive includes a built-in cost model engine, profitability analytics and budgeting/P&L — features competitors either lack or charge extra for. Plus, our Da Vinci agents are built-in, not add-ons.
faq.q3: Can I migrate data from another CRM?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We support CSV/Excel import and have migration scripts for popular CRMs. Our team can assist with complex migrations.
faq.a4: The platform supports Azerbaijani, Russian and English. More languages are on the roadmap.
faq.a5: Yes. We use PostgreSQL with full encryption, role-based access control, 2FA, audit logging and complete data isolation for each organization.
faq.q6: Can I customize the CRM for my industry?
faq.a6: Yes. Custom fields, workflow automation, configurable dashboards and dynamic pricing allow you to adapt LeadDrive to any business model.
faq.a7: Currently we offer cloud deployment. On-premise options are available for Enterprise customers — contact our sales team.
faq.a8: Connect your Email, SMS, Telegram, WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram and VK accounts. All messages appear in a unified inbox with conversation threads per contact.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: LeadDrive Inc. — a European technology company. AI-powered CRM platform built by Ukrainian engineers.
about.missionDesc: Empower businesses of any size with powerful Da Vinci-backed tools — uniting sales, support, finance and analytics on one platform.
about.whatWeDoDesc: LeadDrive CRM — 128+ features, 16 Da Vinci integrations, 11 modules. CRM, marketing automation, support, finance and ERP — all in one.
about.val_security_desc: Your data is stored in an encrypted, isolated environment. GDPR compliant.
about.val_customer_desc: Every decision is based on customer needs. 24/7 support.
about.val_global_desc: European company, global standards. Built by Ukrainian engineers with AZ/RU/EN language support.
about.val_innovation_desc: With Da Vinci — intelligence is the platform's core, not an add-on.
about.val_transparency_desc: No hidden fees. What you see is what you get.
about.val_results_desc: Our clients average 34% profit growth and 60% response time reduction.
about.storyDesc: LeadDrive CRM was born from the vision of Ukrainian engineers who wanted to build a world-class CRM platform in Europe. Our team combines deep technical expertise from Kyiv's thriving tech scene with European business standards. Today, from our Warsaw office, we serve companies across the globe — delivering AI-powered tools that make sales, support and finance seamless.
about.teamDesc: Our engineering team in Kyiv brings years of experience building enterprise software. We believe great CRM should be intelligent by default — that's why Da Vinci AI is woven into every module, not bolted on as an afterthought.

davinci.f1: Automatically selects the most promising customers
davinci.f3: Da Vinci gives the first response — you only handle the tough ones

davinci.f7: Finds answers from the knowledge base — staff works 3x faster

voipSettings.selectProvider: Choose the telephony provider your organization uses.
voipSettings.twilioDesc: Cloud-based telephony via Twilio. Best for global coverage and easy setup. Requires a Twilio account with a purchased phone number.
voipSettings.threecxDesc: On-premise or cloud PBX by 3CX. Connect via the Call Control API to make and manage calls from your 3CX system.
voipSettings.asteriskDesc: Open-source PBX via Asterisk REST Interface (ARI). Ideal for self-hosted telephony with full control.
voipSettings.customSipDesc: Browser-based SIP calling via SIP.js. Connect to any standards-compliant SIP server using WebSocket transport.
voipSettings.twilioNumberHint: Your Twilio phone number for outbound calls

customDomains.title: Custom Domains
customDomains.subtitle: Connect your own domain to serve landing pages
customDomains.noDomainsHint: Add your own domain to serve landing pages under your brand.
customDomains.setupInstructions: Add a CNAME record in your DNS provider pointing to:
customDomains.dnsVerifyFailed: DNS verification failed. Make sure CNAME points to pages.leaddrivecrm.org
customDomains.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this domain?
customDomains.deleteConfirmHint: Landing pages will no longer be accessible on this domain.
customDomains.waitDns: DNS changes may take up to 48 hours to propagate
customDomains.step1Desc: Enter the subdomain or domain you want to use for your landing pages (e.g. landing.yourcompany.com). We'll register it in the system.
customDomains.step2Desc: Go to your DNS provider and add a CNAME record pointing your domain to our server:
customDomains.step3Desc: Click 'Verify DNS' and we'll check the record. Once verified, SSL is issued automatically and your landing pages go live on your domain.
customDomains.dnsNote: DNS propagation can take up to 48 hours. If verification fails, wait and try again.
customDomains.exampleDesc: If your company domain is yourcompany.com and you want landing pages on landing.yourcompany.com:
customDomains.exampleResult: After DNS propagation, visitors to landing.yourcompany.com will see your published landing pages.
customDomains.description: Let your customers access landing pages on your own branded domain instead of a generic URL.
customDomains.addDomainDesc: Enter the domain or subdomain you want to connect. You will need to add a CNAME record in your DNS provider.
customDomains.domainHint: Use a subdomain like landing.yourcompany.com or pages.yourcompany.com

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: LeadDrive Inc. ("Company", "we") respects the privacy of users ("you") of the LeadDrive CRM platform. This Privacy Policy explains how your personal data is collected, used and protected.
privacy.p2: The following data is collected during platform use:
privacy.p2_l1: Registration data: name, email, phone, company name
privacy.p2_l2: Usage data: login times, features used, browser type
privacy.p2_l3: Business data: data created within the platform (companies, contacts, deals)
privacy.p2_l4: Technical data: IP address, device type, operating system
privacy.p3: Collected data is used for the following purposes:
privacy.p3_l2: Managing your account and providing support
privacy.p4: All data is stored in an encrypted PostgreSQL database. Full data isolation is provided for each organization (multi-tenant architecture). Role-based access control and audit logging record every change.
privacy.p5: Your personal data is not sold or rented to third parties. Data is shared only with trusted partners when necessary for service delivery (hosting, email service).
privacy.p6: Our platform uses functional cookies (login session, language preference). Analytical cookies are activated only with your consent.
privacy.p7_l1: Request access to your personal data
privacy.p7_l2: Request correction or deletion of your data

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: These Terms of Service govern the use of the LeadDrive CRM platform ("Service") provided by LeadDrive Inc. ("Company"). By using the Service, you accept these terms.
terms.p2: LeadDrive CRM is a cloud-based customer relationship management platform. The Service includes sales, marketing, support, finance and analytics modules.
terms.p3_l1: You must provide accurate and up-to-date information during registration
terms.p3_l2: You are responsible for account security
terms.p3_l3: You may not transfer your account to third parties
terms.p3_l4: Users under 18 may not use the Service
terms.p4_l1: Payment is made via bank transfer or card
terms.p4_l4: Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period
terms.p5: All data you create on the platform (companies, contacts, deals, invoices, etc.) is your property. You can export your data upon subscription cancellation.
terms.p6_l1: Using the platform for illegal purposes
terms.p6_l2: Attempting to breach the service's security
terms.p6_l3: Unauthorized access to other users' data
terms.p6_l4: Reverse engineering or copying the platform
terms.p7: We target 99.9% uptime, but short interruptions may occur during maintenance or emergencies. Scheduled maintenance is announced in advance.
terms.p8: The Company is not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the Service. Liability for direct damages is limited to the subscription fee paid.
terms.p9: These terms may be updated from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated via email. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
